proof_signals.signal_text: Built and managed A/B testing program
proof_signals.context: Indicates hands-on ownership of experimentation methodology, not just running individual tests

proof_signals.signal_text: Improved conversion rates by measurable percentage through optimization
proof_signals.context: Quantified conversion improvement demonstrates CRO impact — look for specific percentages and funnel stages

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed CRO or experimentation platforms (Optimizely, VWO, Google Optimize)
proof_signals.context: Hands-on tool experience signals dedicated CRO practice rather than ad-hoc testing

proof_signals.signal_text: Analyzed and optimized user funnels or conversion funnels
proof_signals.context: Funnel analysis ownership — look for mentions of specific funnel stages (acquisition, activation, retention)

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed chatbot or conversational marketing tools (Drift, Intercom)
proof_signals.context: Indicates experience with engagement tooling, stronger when combined with A/B testing of chatbot variants

proof_signals.signal_text: Implemented website personalization or dynamic content experiences
proof_signals.context: Personalization experience — stronger if across multiple segments or localized markets

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed and optimized pop-ups, overlays, or banner campaigns for lead generation
proof_signals.context: Specific engagement tactic — indicates hands-on growth marketing execution

proof_signals.signal_text: Built and maintained experimentation or testing roadmaps
proof_signals.context: Roadmap ownership signals strategic experimentation leadership, not just ad-hoc tests

proof_signals.signal_text: Applied statistical significance or hypothesis testing methodology to marketing experiments
proof_signals.context: Statistical rigor in experimentation — distinguishes structured CRO from casual testing

proof_signals.signal_text: Optimized conversion or growth across multiple markets or localized websites
proof_signals.context: Multi-market optimization signals senior growth capability — common in Israeli B2B SaaS

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed interactive product tours or demo tools (Navattic, Walnut, Storylane)
proof_signals.context: Product-led growth tooling — increasingly common in B2B SaaS marketing

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed and ran lifecycle or retention experiments across email, push, or in-app channels
proof_signals.context: Lifecycle experimentation extends growth marketing beyond acquisition into retention

proof_signals.signal_text: Defined and owned growth KPIs including conversion rates, activation, or lead quality metrics
proof_signals.context: KPI ownership signals accountability for growth outcomes, not just execution

proof_signals.signal_text: Leveraged AI or generative AI tools for marketing experimentation or funnel optimization
proof_signals.context: AI-assisted growth marketing — emerging signal that's becoming increasingly valued

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed Meta (Facebook/Instagram) advertising campaigns
proof_signals.context: Core performance marketing skill — look for budget scale and performance metrics

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed Meta Ads campaigns with monthly budgets of $100K+ or $500K+
proof_signals.context: Large-budget Meta management — significantly stronger signal than small-budget campaign management

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, or UAC)
proof_signals.context: Core performance marketing skill — stronger when specifying campaign types and budget scale

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed Google UAC or App Campaigns for mobile app installs at scale
proof_signals.context: Mobile-specific Google campaign expertise — particularly valued in gaming and B2C apps

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed TikTok advertising campaigns
proof_signals.context: Emerging platform expertise — signals adaptability and willingness to test new channels

proof_signals.signal_text: Optimized campaigns for ROAS, CPA, or ROI targets
proof_signals.context: Performance optimization against business metrics — core competency for performance marketers

proof_signals.signal_text: Achieved specific ROAS, CPA, or ROI improvements through campaign optimization
proof_signals.context: Quantified performance achievement — look for specific numbers and context

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed and executed monthly or quarterly media plans
proof_signals.context: Media planning ownership signals strategic capability beyond day-to-day campaign optimization

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed significant advertising budgets with P&L or spend accountability
proof_signals.context: Budget ownership — stronger with specific dollar amounts and accountability for returns

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with mobile measurement partners (AppsFlyer, Adjust, Branch)
proof_signals.context: MMP expertise is essential for mobile performance marketing — particularly strong for gaming and B2C app roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Implemented or managed attribution and tracking infrastructure (pixels, UTMs, server-side tracking)
proof_signals.context: Technical tracking implementation — signals deeper performance marketing capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Led creative A/B testing or creative iteration programs for paid campaigns
proof_signals.context: Creative testing ownership — key signal for performance marketers who drive creative strategy

proof_signals.signal_text: Briefed and collaborated with creative teams on ad creatives and marketing assets
proof_signals.context: Creative collaboration signals ability to work cross-functionally with design/video teams

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed relationships with ad networks, DSPs, SDK networks, or acquisition partners
proof_signals.context: Partner management experience — particularly valued in mobile gaming and B2C user acquisition

proof_signals.signal_text: Ran campaigns across DSPs, SDK networks, or programmatic platforms
proof_signals.context: Programmatic and network experience — extends beyond self-serve platforms (Meta/Google)

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed performance campaigns across multiple platforms simultaneously
proof_signals.context: Multi-channel management signals breadth and ability to allocate budgets across platforms

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed performance campaigns across international or global markets
proof_signals.context: International campaign experience — common in Israeli companies targeting US, EU, and global markets

proof_signals.signal_text: Built performance dashboards or reporting for campaign metrics
proof_signals.context: Dashboard building signals analytical depth and ability to communicate performance to stakeholders

proof_signals.signal_text: Used Google Analytics 4 (GA4) for campaign analysis and reporting
proof_signals.context: GA4 proficiency is table-stakes for performance marketing — stronger when combined with other analytics tools

proof_signals.signal_text: Used BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Looker Studio) for marketing analysis
proof_signals.context: BI tool proficiency for marketing analytics — signals data sophistication beyond platform-native reporting

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted cohort analysis, LTV analysis, or CAC/LTV modeling
proof_signals.context: Unit economics analysis — connects campaign performance to business-level metrics

proof_signals.signal_text: Scaled advertising campaigns or ad budgets while maintaining efficiency targets
proof_signals.context: Scaling with efficiency is the key challenge in performance marketing — strong differentiator

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed user acquisition for mobile games or mobile apps
proof_signals.context: Mobile gaming UA is a specialized and high-demand skill — particularly valued in Israeli gaming companies

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed retargeting or remarketing campaigns
proof_signals.context: Retargeting expertise extends beyond pure acquisition into user lifecycle management

proof_signals.signal_text: Used AI tools for ad creative generation or campaign optimization
proof_signals.context: AI-assisted performance marketing — rapidly becoming a standard expectation in Israeli tech

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted competitive or market research to identify new acquisition channels or opportunities
proof_signals.context: Competitive intelligence for performance marketing — signals strategic thinking beyond campaign execution

proof_signals.signal_text: Identified and tested new acquisition channels, platforms, or partners
proof_signals.context: Channel exploration signals proactive growth mindset and strategic contribution
